cn.metaDescription.design: FGESTUDIO 提供平价平面设计服务，包括开业与活动宣传配套、自媒体月配套、YouTube 视频封面月配套、海报、名片、横幅和社媒帖子设计。
cn.pricing.title: 从单次宣传到长期内容更新，选择适合你的设计配套。
cn.pricing.copy: 配套分为一次性宣传、自媒体月配套和 YouTube 视频封面月配套。具体制作时间、修改范围与交付安排可通过 WhatsApp 确认。
cn.pricing.starter.label: 开业・活动・企业形象
cn.pricing.starter.title: 一次性宣传配套
cn.pricing.starter.item1: 平价开业宣传配套｜RM239（原价 RM250）：海报 ×1、名片 ×1、自媒体帖子 ×1
cn.pricing.starter.item2: 平价活动宣传配套｜RM329（原价 RM350）：海报 ×1、横幅 ×1、自媒体帖子 ×1
cn.pricing.starter.item3: 企业基础形象配套｜RM449（原价 RM480）：名片 ×1、海报 ×1、横幅 ×1、自媒体帖子 ×2
cn.pricing.standard.label: 适合长期经营社交媒体
cn.pricing.standard.title: 自媒体月配套
cn.pricing.standard.item1: 社媒轻量月配套｜RM289/月：自媒体帖子设计 ×4，适合每周发布一次
cn.pricing.standard.item2: 社媒标准月配套｜RM529/月：自媒体帖子设计 ×8，适合每周发布两次
cn.pricing.standard.item3: 社媒进阶月配套｜RM729/月：自媒体帖子设计 ×12，适合餐饮、美容、补习、旅行、汽车服务与房产等行业
cn.pricing.monthly.label: 适合 YouTube 创作者与频道
cn.pricing.monthly.title: YouTube 视频封面月配套
cn.pricing.monthly.item1: 视频封面轻量月配套｜RM329/月：封面设计 ×4、封面标题优化 ×4
cn.pricing.monthly.item2: 视频封面标准月配套｜RM589/月：封面设计 ×8、封面标题优化 ×8
cn.pricing.monthly.item3: 视频封面进阶月配套｜RM889/月：封面设计 ×12、封面标题优化 ×12，赠送自媒体帖子 ×1

en.metaDescription.design: FGESTUDIO provides affordable graphic design services, including launch and campaign bundles, monthly social media packages, YouTube thumbnail packages, posters, business cards, banners, and social media post designs.
en.pricing.title: Choose a design package for one-off promotions or ongoing content.
en.pricing.copy: Packages are grouped into one-off promotional bundles, monthly social media support, and monthly YouTube thumbnail support. Timelines, revision scope, and delivery arrangements can be confirmed through WhatsApp.
en.pricing.starter.label: Launch, campaign & brand essentials
en.pricing.starter.title: One-Off Promotion Packages
en.pricing.starter.item1: Affordable Launch Package | RM239 (was RM250): 1 poster, 1 business card, and 1 social media post
en.pricing.starter.item2: Affordable Campaign Package | RM329 (was RM350): 1 poster, 1 banner, and 1 social media post
en.pricing.starter.item3: Business Essentials Package | RM449 (was RM480): 1 business card, 1 poster, 1 banner, and 2 social media posts
en.pricing.standard.label: For consistent social media activity
en.pricing.standard.title: Monthly Social Media Packages
en.pricing.standard.item1: Lite | RM289/month: 4 social media post designs, suitable for one post per week
en.pricing.standard.item2: Standard | RM529/month: 8 social media post designs, suitable for two posts per week
en.pricing.standard.item3: Advanced | RM729/month: 12 social media post designs for F&B, beauty, tuition, travel, automotive services, property, and similar businesses
en.pricing.monthly.label: For YouTube creators and channels
en.pricing.monthly.title: Monthly YouTube Thumbnail Packages
en.pricing.monthly.item1: Lite | RM329/month: 4 thumbnail designs and 4 thumbnail title optimisations
en.pricing.monthly.item2: Standard | RM589/month: 8 thumbnail designs and 8 thumbnail title optimisations
en.pricing.monthly.item3: Advanced | RM889/month: 12 thumbnail designs, 12 thumbnail title optimisations, plus 1 complimentary social media post

bm.metaDescription.design: FGESTUDIO menyediakan servis reka bentuk grafik mampu milik termasuk pakej pembukaan dan promosi, pakej media sosial bulanan, pakej thumbnail YouTube, poster, kad nama, banner dan hantaran media sosial.
bm.pricing.title: Pilih pakej reka bentuk untuk promosi sekali atau kandungan bulanan.
bm.pricing.copy: Pakej dibahagikan kepada promosi sekali, media sosial bulanan dan thumbnail YouTube bulanan. Tempoh kerja, skop pindaan dan penghantaran boleh disahkan melalui WhatsApp.
bm.pricing.starter.label: Pembukaan, promosi & imej bisnes
bm.pricing.starter.title: Pakej Promosi Sekali
bm.pricing.starter.item1: Pakej Pembukaan Mampu Milik | RM239 (harga asal RM250): 1 poster, 1 kad nama dan 1 hantaran media sosial
bm.pricing.starter.item2: Pakej Promosi Mampu Milik | RM329 (harga asal RM350): 1 poster, 1 banner dan 1 hantaran media sosial
bm.pricing.starter.item3: Pakej Imej Asas Perniagaan | RM449 (harga asal RM480): 1 kad nama, 1 poster, 1 banner dan 2 hantaran media sosial
bm.pricing.standard.label: Untuk media sosial yang konsisten
bm.pricing.standard.title: Pakej Media Sosial Bulanan
bm.pricing.standard.item1: Ringan | RM289/bulan: 4 reka bentuk hantaran media sosial, sesuai untuk satu hantaran seminggu
bm.pricing.standard.item2: Standard | RM529/bulan: 8 reka bentuk hantaran media sosial, sesuai untuk dua hantaran seminggu
bm.pricing.standard.item3: Lanjutan | RM729/bulan: 12 reka bentuk hantaran untuk F&B, kecantikan, tuisyen, pelancongan, servis automotif, hartanah dan bisnes seumpamanya
bm.pricing.monthly.label: Untuk pencipta dan channel YouTube
bm.pricing.monthly.title: Pakej Thumbnail YouTube Bulanan
bm.pricing.monthly.item1: Ringan | RM329/bulan: 4 reka bentuk thumbnail dan 4 pengoptimuman tajuk thumbnail
bm.pricing.monthly.item2: Standard | RM589/bulan: 8 reka bentuk thumbnail dan 8 pengoptimuman tajuk thumbnail
bm.pricing.monthly.item3: Lanjutan | RM889/bulan: 12 reka bentuk thumbnail, 12 pengoptimuman tajuk dan percuma 1 hantaran media sosial
